name: William, Craig
clubs: Y. M. C. A., Ranch No. 2
description: Witty Independent Lively Overzealous Unconventional Amicable Mischievous
text: Witty Independent Lively Overzealous Unconventional Amicable Mischievous

name: Mcrae, Mary Alice
description: Methodical Artistic Reserved Yielding Angelic Liberal Independent Cautious Engaging
text: Methodical Artistic Reserved Yielding Angelic Liberal Independent Cautious Engaging

name: Tullis, Gladys
description: Graceful Lovable Aristocratic Demure Youthful Sympathetic.
text: Graceful Lovable Aristocratic Demure Youthful Sympathetic.

name: Mcdaniel, Emmagene
description: Efficient Modest Moral Amiable Good Earnest Noteless Exceptional.
text: Efficient Modest Moral Amiable Good Earnest Noteless Exceptional.

name: Nada, Northum
description: Elected Most Industrious Student.
text: Elected Most Industrious Student.

name: Milton, Talley
description: M. unusual. I. reasonable. L. valuable. T. timid. O. punctual. N. lazy.
text: M. unusual. I. reasonable. L. valuable. T. timid. O. punctual. N. lazy.

name: Aileen, McWilliam
description: Elected Most Intellectual. A. agreeable I. intellectual L. lucky E. ever Ready E. essential N. neat.
text: Elected Most Intellectual. A. agreeable I. intellectual L. lucky E. ever Ready E. essential N. neat.

name: D. S., Collins
description: D. earnest S. sincere
text: D. earnest S. sincere

name: Lucille, Lewis
description: Elected Most Popular Girl. L. loyal U. useful C. capricious I. imaginative L. lyrical L. lovable E. energetic
text: Elected Most Popular Girl. L. loyal U. useful C. capricious I. imaginative L. lyrical L. lovable E. energetic

name: Sewell, Melle
description: Modest Elating Lovable Laborious Enjoyable
text: Modest Elating Lovable Laborious Enjoyable

name: Walker, Aurelius
description: Audacious Unconcerned Rowdy Erratic Loquacious Individual Unfeigned Sly
text: Audacious Unconcerned Rowdy Erratic Loquacious Individual Unfeigned Sly

name: Buffington, Ruth
description: Restful Ungarnished Truthful Happy
text: Restful Ungarnished Truthful Happy

name: Thomas, Graham
description: Grabs grades greedily. Grins gravely. Gives giddy girls go-by.
text: Grabs grades greedily. Grins gravely. Gives giddy girls go-by.

name: Lewis, Opal
description: Lively, lucky, light-hearted. Laughs loudly. Learns lessons leisurely.
text: Lively, lucky, light-hearted. Laughs loudly. Learns lessons leisurely.

name: Mcmillan, Hugh
description: Manifests manifold manners. Masters mathematics marvelously. Modest, moral, methodical.
text: Manifests manifold manners. Masters mathematics marvelously. Modest, moral, methodical.

name: Rowe, Nita
description: Radiant, refined, romantic. Reputation reveals rare renown. Recites recipes remarkably.
text: Radiant, refined, romantic. Reputation reveals rare renown. Recites recipes remarkably.

name: Bruce, Thelma
description: Bewilders boys, behaves beautifully.
text: Bewilders boys, behaves beautifully.

name: Grady, Ruby
description: Gets good grades; giggles gleefully, gains great glory.
text: Gets good grades; giggles gleefully, gains great glory.

name: Bishop, Vera
description: Brilliant busy-body, boasts brains but breaks Bill.
text: Brilliant busy-body, boasts brains but breaks Bill.

name: Musgrove, Robert
description: Makes Madge mighty mushy, most misleading, may mention matrimony.
text: Makes Madge mighty mushy, most misleading, may mention matrimony.

name: Roberts, Forrest
description: Reputably reported, resembles Rudolph, remains recklessly resistless. Rigorously righteous.
text: Reputably reported, resembles Rudolph, remains recklessly resistless. Rigorously righteous.

name: Jarrell, Jackson
description: Juvenile, jolly. Jokingly peers judgment. Joins jabbering jesters jubilantly.
text: Juvenile, jolly. Jokingly peers judgment. Joins jabbering jesters jubilantly.

name: Mabel, Robertson
description: Resorted, radiant, ready, really remarkable. Reasons rationally.
text: Resorted, radiant, ready, really remarkable. Reasons rationally.

name: Jerome, Luck
description: Loquacious lounge-lizard; likes love-learning, learns laboratory lessons; Luck's lucky.
text: Loquacious lounge-lizard; likes love-learning, learns laboratory lessons; Luck's lucky.

name: Thelma, Child
description: Careful, capable, comely. Continually 'courting' collegians.
text: Careful, capable, comely. Continually 'courting' collegians.

name: Terrell, Moore
description: Marked Magnolia's most magnetic man, maddens mothers, manages maidens, meddles mercilessly.
text: Marked Magnolia's most magnetic man, maddens mothers, manages maidens, meddles mercilessly.

name: William, S. Ridgdill
description: Responsible reporter. Returns ready repartee. Relishes refreshments.
text: Responsible reporter. Returns ready repartee. Relishes refreshments.

name: Vernice, Bruce
description: Blushes becomingly. Believes benevolence benefits. Begrudges bashful blunders.
text: Blushes becomingly. Believes benevolence benefits. Begrudges bashful blunders.

name: Lloyd, Carruthers
description: Career concerns cuteness, cheerfulness, capers. Constantly creates commotion.
text: Career concerns cuteness, cheerfulness, capers. Constantly creates commotion.

name: Ruth, Mcdaniel
description: Modest modern's model manners mystify men, makes many mad.
text: Modest modern's model manners mystify men, makes many mad.

name: Hugh, Munn
description: Mischief maker, meanders mysteriously, may mean moonlight madness.
text: Mischief maker, meanders mysteriously, may mean moonlight madness.

name: Clifford, Ryan
description: Reasonable, rational, retentive; releases remarkable rejoinders.
text: Reasonable, rational, retentive; releases remarkable rejoinders.

name: Jane, Garland
description: Gay, gracious, genial, gregarious. Giggles generally. Gifted gab gushes.
text: Gay, gracious, genial, gregarious. Giggles generally. Gifted gab gushes.

name: Algia, Whitten
description: Works willingly without worrying, while we worry without working.
text: Works willingly without worrying, while we worry without working.

name: Louise, Callocott
description: Can't cut classes, cautiously conducts campus courting. Certainly cracks commendable comedy.
text: Can't cut classes, cautiously conducts campus courting. Certainly cracks commendable comedy.

name: Willie, Couch
description: Couch's career concerns capricious capers; can't conceal cleverness.
text: Couch's career concerns capricious capers; can't conceal cleverness.

name: Monroe, Denton
description: Doesn't do devilish deeds. Displays decided determination; diplomatically dispels discontent.
text: Doesn't do devilish deeds. Displays decided determination; diplomatically dispels discontent.

name: Helen, Polk
description: Prefers parlor-parking, plays pranks properly, possesses particularly pleasant personality.
text: Prefers parlor-parking, plays pranks properly, possesses particularly pleasant personality.

name: Joe, Rhodes
description: Ranks really remarkably, realizes reading reaps rich rewards, reveals right rearing.
text: Ranks really remarkably, realizes reading reaps rich rewards, reveals right rearing.

name: Creo Belle, Bennett
description: Beautiful blond baby; bothers boys; being blarney.
text: Beautiful blond baby; bothers boys; being blarney.

name: Stevens, Beulah
description: Sometimes sweet, sometimes severe, sometimes saucy, sometimes sweet.
text: Sometimes sweet, sometimes severe, sometimes saucy, sometimes sweet.

name: Reynolds, Doris
description: Raves refreshingly. Rarely remembers realizations. Rather recommends originality.
text: Raves refreshingly. Rarely remembers realizations. Rather recommends originality.

name: Jones, Foster
description: Jovial jester, juggles jokes, makes jokes valiantly.
text: Jovial jester, juggles jokes, makes jokes valiantly.

name: Ames, Cromer
description: Agreeably accredited at athletics. An able ally. Always active and acting useful.
text: Agreeably accredited at athletics. An able ally. Always active and acting useful.

name: Rogers, Janie
description: Raves rhythm. Remains really romantic, rather rural romantic.
text: Raves rhythm. Remains really romantic, rather rural romantic.

name: Pettus, Gayle
description: Pretty, petite, pleasant. Primarily paramount. Personality: perhaps points.
text: Pretty, petite, pleasant. Primarily paramount. Personality: perhaps points.

name: Shewmake, Frank
description: Short, stubby, smart. Says silly things. Sometimes strangely silent; studying sometimes.
text: Short, stubby, smart. Says silly things. Sometimes strangely silent; studying sometimes.

name: Dodd, Denson
description: Drolls durnfully. Doesn't dare doing difficult deals. Dally dally dally diligently.
text: Drolls durnfully. Doesn't dare doing difficult deals. Dally dally dally diligently.

name: Bishop, Lee
description: Beautiful man; behaves. Blushes bashfully. Believes being brilliant begins big business.
text: Beautiful man; behaves. Blushes bashfully. Believes being brilliant begins big business.

name: Harrington, Eugene
description: Hard-boiled heart-breaker. Has honorable tale. Some happy history.
text: Hard-boiled heart-breaker. Has honorable tale. Some happy history.

name: Gilbert, Measeles
description: Grows successfully when flowers are rarest.
text: Grows successfully when flowers are rarest.

name: Cecil, Price
description: The Iris stands for wisdom, truth and courage, and has always been the emblem for chivalry.
text: The Iris stands for wisdom, truth and courage, and has always been the emblem for chivalry.

name: Docia, Gay
description: An ever-popular blossom, whose sprightly air and gay color attracts the eye and forever charms.
text: An ever-popular blossom, whose sprightly air and gay color attracts the eye and forever charms.

name: Bernard, Polk
description: Generous in its bloom, and sheltering while it clings, sturdy Morning Glory.
text: Generous in its bloom, and sheltering while it clings, sturdy Morning Glory.

name: Donnie Marie, Cheek
description: Among the sweetest of all flowers that bloom where Aggies tread.
text: Among the sweetest of all flowers that bloom where Aggies tread.

name: Jasper, Goza
description: A dignified and majestic plant that loves sunny weather, but bravely faces the storm.
text: A dignified and majestic plant that loves sunny weather, but bravely faces the storm.

name: Adell, Steed
description: Blossoms beautifully without cultivation, hardy and can bear strong sunlight.
text: Blossoms beautifully without cultivation, hardy and can bear strong sunlight.

name: William, Greer
description: Sweet William appears in each unexpected place, waving a welcome with his handsome face.
text: Sweet William appears in each unexpected place, waving a welcome with his handsome face.

name: Ruth, Anderson
description: Not one of Flora's brilliant race, a form more perfect can display, art could not feign more simple grace, nor nature take a line away.
text: Not one of Flora's brilliant race, a form more perfect can display, art could not feign more simple grace, nor nature take a line away.

name: Lester, Gordon
description: Dear flower that grows beside the way, fringing the dusty road with harmless gold.
text: Dear flower that grows beside the way, fringing the dusty road with harmless gold.

name: Ione, Arrington
description: A flower whose very name suggests a breath of spicy fragrance, and a vision of sweet old-fashioned gardens.
text: A flower whose very name suggests a breath of spicy fragrance, and a vision of sweet old-fashioned gardens.

name: Elijah, Looney
description: Within the folds of Lotus Flower is nestled the secret of golden wisdom.
text: Within the folds of Lotus Flower is nestled the secret of golden wisdom.

name: Elby, Dalton
description: Tall and stately, always faces toward the sun.
text: Tall and stately, always faces toward the sun.

name: Wright, Patterson
description: The flower found by classical writers, and one that will ever be popular.
text: The flower found by classical writers, and one that will ever be popular.

name: Tavia, Hope
description: The Hyacinth with its unchanging blue, is the symbol for constancy.
text: The Hyacinth with its unchanging blue, is the symbol for constancy.

name: Horace, Wilson
description: It is attractive in its early life, but will be more attractive when grown.
text: It is attractive in its early life, but will be more attractive when grown.

name: Wilma, York
description: To whisper hope, to comfort man, whenever his hope is dim.
text: To whisper hope, to comfort man, whenever his hope is dim.

name: Madge, Polk
description: The flower that stands for love, and with its attractive appearance wins the love of everybody and one in particular.
text: The flower that stands for love, and with its attractive appearance wins the love of everybody and one in particular.

name: Claud, Horn
description: Ah, shy, reticent flower, full of secrets you dare not tell.
text: Ah, shy, reticent flower, full of secrets you dare not tell.

name: Gertine, Pinkerton
description: So breezy and refreshing is the Anemone, that it well deserves the name "wind flower."
text: So breezy and refreshing is the Anemone, that it well deserves the name "wind flower."

name: Theo, Middlebrooks
description: Bright in many ways, addicted to "popping off," and sometimes puts people to sleep.
text: Bright in many ways, addicted to "popping off," and sometimes puts people to sleep.

name: Alta Mae, Perry
description: And the stately lilies stand fair in the silvery light, like saintly vestals, in prayer.
text: And the stately lilies stand fair in the silvery light, like saintly vestals, in prayer.

name: Benjamin, Wells
description: Diminutive in stature, but one of the most artistic plants.
text: Diminutive in stature, but one of the most artistic plants.

name: Thelma, Hughes
description: Grave and maidenly, just like a sprig from an old-fashioned bouquet.
text: Grave and maidenly, just like a sprig from an old-fashioned bouquet.

name: Ollie, Booth
description: A daring, sunshiny flower that brightens many lonely spots.
text: A daring, sunshiny flower that brightens many lonely spots.

name: Edward, Ritchie
description: The name does describe it well, for it has a different smile for each.
text: The name does describe it well, for it has a different smile for each.

name: Frances, Lester
description: Darling of the forest, blossoming alone, when Earth's grief is sorest for her jewels gone.
text: Darling of the forest, blossoming alone, when Earth's grief is sorest for her jewels gone.

name: Myers, Cecil
description: A flower noted for its showy head that always remains single.
text:
"BACHELOR BUTTON"
A flower noted for its showy head that always remains single.

name: Lloyd, Ernest
description: Open your round of starry folds, ye ardent Marigold.
text:
"MARIGOLD"
Open your round of starry folds, ye ardent Marigold.

name: Weir, Lucille
description: Delicate, graceful, wistful flower, when can thy glory fade?
text:
"WISTERIA"
Delicate, graceful, wistful flower, when can thy glory fade?

name: Doss, Ebbert
description: A plant whose trumpet-shaped blossoms bring a message that inspires us.
text:
"PETUNIA"
A plant whose trumpet-shaped blossoms bring a message that inspires us.

name: Moses, Claud
description: The flower that makes its appearance late in the day, but whose comeliness overcomes delay.
text:
"FOUR O'CLOCK"
The flower that makes its appearance late in the day, but whose comeliness overcomes delay.

name: Freeman, Erma
description: Wee, modest, crimson-tipped flower, that lifts its unassuming head among millions.
text:
"DAISY"
Wee, modest, crimson-tipped flower, that lifts its unassuming head among millions.

name: Rigby, Lawson
description: Of all the bonny flowers that come and go, the purple pansy brings the deepest thoughts.
text:
"PANSY"
Of all the bonny flowers that come and go, the purple pansy brings the deepest thoughts.

name: Barksdale, Oagle
description: A lovely demure flower that tries to hide its beauty by being small.
text:
"NASTURTIUM"
A lovely demure flower that tries to hide its beauty by being small.

name: Lewis, Clyde
description: Thou art the sweetest flower that ever drank the amber shower. Thou art the fondest Child of Spring.
text:
"ROSE"
Thou art the sweetest flower that ever drank the amber shower. Thou art the fondest Child of Spring.

name: Robertson, Adler
description: A plant whose snow-gemmed branches are spread neither proudly high nor meanly low.
text:
"GRAPE MYRTLE"
A plant whose snow-gemmed branches are spread neither proudly high nor meanly low.
